title: OpenSUSE Kalpa
full_text:
Overview
 

Kalpa

Kalpa is an atomic and transactional Linux desktop offering the Plasma Desktop Environment, From the KDE Project

Desktop is derived from Tumbleweed

Base system is derived from MicroOS

Member of the openSUSE Project

Installation

Download installation media Installation ISO

Documentation

Please see the Documentation page.

Contributing and communications

Special thanks

Aeon for so much of the heavy lifting that made Kalpa possible

Codeberg for providing the site hosting

Zola for making deploying a website not something that makes me want to tear my hair out

Juice for making it easier to have a website that doesn't make my eyes bleed
